data.name: label4.Text
data.value: 1. Any damage or loss caused by running this program shall be borne by the user. 2. This program is for entertainment purposes only. It is prohibited to use it to damage the computer. 3. Do not modify this program without permission. The losses caused by modifying this program shall still be borne by the user. 4. The compilation of this program has no malicious intent. 5. Some functions of this program may cause discomfort to epilepsy patients (especially photic sensitivity). Epilepsy patients should not run it. The above-mentioned contents include legal responsibilities.
